title: anthemis artemisioides
intro: Anthemis artemisioides, also known as California sagewort, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthemis artemisioides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
